name: a plainly-worded appointment note becomes its own appointment entity
description: Field-observed regression (grok-4.3, note-extract-v11): the note 'I have an appointment tomorrow at the dentist at 1300' extracted as Me -scheduledTime-> the dentist (kind event), so NO appointment entity existed and the calendar projection found nothing. v12 teaches the model that a scheduled appointment is its OWN entity (kind 'appointment') that OWNS a date-valued scheduledTime STATE fact — value_json.start + temporal — never a relationship hung off the author or the place. This scenario pins that corrected shape: one provisional appointment entity with exactly one active scheduledTime state fact at the resolved time.

steps.body: I have an appointment tomorrow at the dentist at 1300.

mentions.name: dentist appointment
mentions.surface_text: an appointment tomorrow at the dentist

facts.statement: Dentist appointment is scheduled for Sunday 2026-06-14 at 1:00 PM.
